Page BT Setup Wizard - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Configure additional account settings for the financial statements.
trans-unit.note: Page BT Setup Wizard - Control AccountsHeading - Property InstructionalText
Page BT Setup Wizard - Control AccountsHeading - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Choose Finish to save the setup. You can change all settings later from the BilanzTool Setup page.
trans-unit.note: Page BT Setup Wizard - Control DoneHeading - Property InstructionalText
Page BT Setup Wizard - Control DoneHeading - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Select the default grouping headers for each financial statement type. These will be preselected when creating new reports.
trans-unit.note: Page BT Setup Wizard - Control GroupingHeading - Property InstructionalText
Page BT Setup Wizard - Control GroupingHeading - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Choose Next to configure your default account groupings.
trans-unit.note: Page BT Setup Wizard - Control NextSteps - Property InstructionalText
Page BT Setup Wizard - Control NextSteps - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: This wizard helps you configure BilanzTool for creating financial statements directly in Business Central.
trans-unit.note: Page BT Setup Wizard - Control WelcomeHeading - Property InstructionalText
Page BT Setup Wizard - Control WelcomeHeading - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Configure the General Journal for automatic postings.
trans-unit.note: Page BT Setup Wizard - Control JournalHeading - Property InstructionalText
Page BT Setup Wizard - Control JournalHeading - Property Caption
Page BT Setup Wizard - Action ActionBack - Property Caption
Page BT Setup Wizard - Action ActionFinish - Property Caption
